title: Regolamenti dwar Supervisory Consolidation (Credit Institutions)

SUPERVISORY CONSOLIDATION
(CREDIT INSTITUTIONS)

[ L.S. 371.22

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 371.22
REGOLAMENTI DWAR SUPERVISORY
CONSOLIDATION (CREDIT INSTITUTIONS)
1 ta’ Frar, 2022
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 494 tal-2021, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 148 tal2023, 44 u 153 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
